markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, industry page refreshes, and reporting needs.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Industry Page Strategy Blocked:** Refreshes are paused until Maddy and Julian finalize a new page template. The goal is to shift from top-funnel content to a product-focused format that better answers user questions.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Content Creation Unblocked:** GrowthX will use its new "ETSA" researcher tool to gather industry-specific details, removing Maddy as a bottleneck for providing content scripts.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**Reporting Needs Defined:** Maddy requested monthly reports on bottom-funnel keyword rankings, competitive analysis (especially for AI receptionists), and backlink performance to enable data-driven decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**Reddit Strategy Rejected:** Maddy rejected a proposed Reddit strategy, citing the platform's sensitive audience and the risk of negative brand perception if the agency were to manage it.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

## Topics

### Industry Page Strategy & Content

  - [**Problem:** Current industry pages are top-funnel, failing to answer specific user questions.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new page template will be created to shift the focus to a product-style format for AI/VR receptionists.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Blocker:** All industry page refreshes are paused until Maddy and Julian finalize the new template (ETA: Monday).](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Content Source:** GrowthX will use the new "ETSA" researcher tool to gather industry-specific details, removing Maddy as a content bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The tool's power is proven by its use in high-stakes compliance and governance industries.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [**Backup:** GrowthX may also scrape Smith.ai's YouTube channel for content.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [**Page Priority:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [**Focus:** Legal and Home Services, which have high close rates.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**Avoid:** Medical/Dental topics, as Smith.ai is not HIPAA compliant.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
      - [**Maddy's Role:** Maddy will personally handle the Legal page refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### VR Content Refreshes

  - [**Goal:** Refresh underperforming Virtual Receptionist (VR) content to improve rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Do not refresh product announcement posts (e.g., "new," "release").](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Expand the refresh scope to include synonyms like "answering services" and "call center" to capture more search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### Reporting & Backlinking

  - [**Maddy's Request:** Monthly reports to support data-driven decisions and reduce Maddy's decision fatigue.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
          - [Bottom-funnel keyword rankings (e.g., "legal answering service").](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
          - [Competitive analysis, focusing on the fast-growing AI receptionist market.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [**Backlinking Update:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
      - [**Status:** GrowthX confirmed a backlinking campaign has been running since May.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide a performance report next week.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
      - [**Future:** GrowthX may discontinue backlinking due to low ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

### New Content Pipeline

  - [**Pillar Pages:** GrowthX will finalize one pillar page design and present it for Maddy and Julian's review.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [**City Pages:** A template is being built by Vol; a draft is expected by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [**Template Articles:** One SEO-optimized article per week will be created around a new template.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [**Call Flow Design Hub:** The "Call Flow Design" blog post will be published and will link to the pillar pages once the hub is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
      - [Finalize and present the pillar page design to Maddy and Julian.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
      - [Deliver the city page template draft by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [Provide the backlinking campaign performance report next week.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
      - [Finalize the new industry page template with Julian by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Review the "Call Flow Design" blog post for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/JzDufvuV8SY38jTiWrmE-L4FKUqE2gzL?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
